inputs: One Cerberus ReviewArtifact plus ReviewReceiptBundle.v1, authored fresh from SKILL.md and the schema types only (backlog 014 child 5).
outputs: Key recall over two seeded defects, one matched and one missed.
decision: Prove a cold agent — SKILL.md and the schema Rust types only, no chat context, no copy of an existing spec's exact shape — can author a spec that validates and runs hermetically.
